not going to be like, here's your protect module, here's your observe, here's your evaluate, and it become the holistic platform.

don't know, what's the timeline for that?

you give more context?

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming product changes.](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Galileo's website migration to Framer planned for next week, potentially impacting content performance](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Record-breaking organic traffic: 1000+ total sessions, with 945 organic sessions across all channels](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Galileo consolidating platform to 2.0 version by June, introducing multimodal app logging and new evaluation capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Shift in messaging focus towards "reliability" for AI products, moving away from feature-centric communication](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation and Performance

  - [Article scheduled for this week](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [PR increase noted, indicating positive content strategy impact](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [well-ent.exe file created; exploring automation for direct system integration](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Record 1000+ total sessions, 945 organic sessions across all channels](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [573 clicks from Google Search Console, 146 sessions from LLM traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Traffic sources: GPT and Perplexity (search results, direct citations)](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

### Website Migration

  - [Switching to Framer next week](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Potential issues: broken images, API connections](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Technical review needed in weeks 2-3 of May](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [May require blog content updates (images, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)

### Platform Consolidation and New Features

  - [Transitioning customers to 2.0 platform by June](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [New capabilities: multimodal app logging, new visualizations, metrics](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [New presets for agent evaluation launching in June](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Potential rewrite of product messaging across the site](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Shift from modular approach (protect, observe, evaluate) to holistic platform](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)

### Messaging Strategy Shift

  - [Moving towards "reliability" as a key selling point](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Transitioning from feature-focused to value-focused communication](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Messaging docs and final language still in development](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)

### Performance Reporting

  - [Search Console data issues noted across clients](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [GA4 data included for broader organic traffic insights](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Referral traffic increase, potentially from Reddit partnership](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule technical review for new website (weeks 2-3 of May)](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Update knowledge bases once new website language is finalized](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Explore content ideas around specific observability areas (e.g., log streams, tracing)](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Await updated messaging docs for "reliability" focus](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Prepare for potential rewrite of product language across the site](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Monitor and address any issues arising from website migration](https://fathom.video/share/ioc8GBoosSU9Z1QMSVkykP4szHgram1V?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
